session.user: Run `make ty` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results - pass or fail with full error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run `make ty` in the erk directory and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checking with make ty

session.tool_result: uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
**ty passed**: All type checks passed successfully.
The command executed `uv run ty check` and confirmed that all type checking passed with no diagnostics or errors found.
